name: JellyWatch
overview: Custom Jellyfin plugin that provides richer webhooks and API endpoints for the JellyWatch media organizer
description: Companion plugin for JellyWatch media organizer - provides custom endpoints and event forwarding

versions.changelog: Fix MissingMethodException crash on Jellyfin 10.11.x - use IMediaSourceManager for media streams
Initial release with custom API endpoints and event forwarding
